title: Siemens — Xcelerator / industrial AI / digital twin / software-defined automation
notes: Siemens describes AI, digital twin, software-defined automation and Xcelerator marketplace/products including NX, Teamcenter, Femap, Building X, Electrification X.

title: Siemens Digital Industries Software
notes: Siemens industrial software product ecosystem.

title: Dassault Systèmes — 3DEXPERIENCE platform
notes: 3DEXPERIENCE platform connects people, ideas, data and solutions; single version of truth; virtual twin; cloud; marketplace.

title: PTC Products
notes: PTC product portfolio includes Codebeamer, Modeler, RV&S, Windchill, ThingWorx, Kepware, Vuforia and Onshape-related product lines.

title: Rockwell Automation — FactoryTalk
notes: FactoryTalk software covers design, operations, maintenance, analytics, IIoT, AR and machine learning for industrial environments.

title: OPC Foundation — OPC UA
notes: OPC UA is a platform-independent architecture for industrial interoperability; supports security and machine-to-enterprise connectivity.

title: ISA — ISA/IEC 62443 Series of Standards
notes: ISA/IEC 62443 defines requirements/processes for secure industrial automation and control systems.

title: ISA — ISA-95 Enterprise-Control System Integration
notes: ISA-95 is the enterprise-control system integration standard used to structure ERP/MES/OT boundaries.

title: HiveMQ — Unified Namespace
notes: Unified Namespace reference for MQTT-based industrial data architecture.

title: Eclipse Sparkplug
notes: Sparkplug provides MQTT topic namespace and payload standards for industrial devices and applications.
